payload.title: Migrate auth service to OAuth2
payload.description: Complete migration of authentication service from basic auth to OAuth2. Target: End of Q2 2026.

payload.title: Set up Kubernetes manifests for all services
payload.description: Create K8s deployment, service, and ingress manifests for all microservices. Deprecate Docker Swarm configs.

payload.title: Infrastructure cooling policy enforcement
payload.message: Reminder: cooling limits are 180°C. Any change requires CTO approval.

payload.title: Implement API rate limiting across all endpoints
payload.description: Enforce 1000 req/min per user rate limiting on all API endpoints. Audit existing endpoints for compliance.
